name: nuewframe-marketplace
description: Nuewframe marketplace — portable agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and GitHub Copilot. Currently hosts: praxis.

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Lean wave-based product delivery unified with Principal Engineer discipline: three-mode engineer persona (architect / implementer / reviewer), three-tier change triage, mechanical Design Approval, waves, thin-slices, code contribution intake, immutable sprint bridges, hypothesis loops, capability-driven architecture, anti-dumping + sleep + skipped-test + port/adapter-parity enforcement, ADR discipline, Pyramid Test Strategy, defensive implementation, TDD verification.
